title: PseudonymiseAnchorCommand
description: Payload for CMD.SUP.002.BEN.PSEUDONYMISE_ANCHOR — execute the GDPR Art. 17 right-to-be-forgotten on the anchor's PII. Crypto-shreds last_name, first_name, date_of_birth, contact_details. Irreversible.

right_exercise_id.description: UUIDv7 of the upstream right-to-be-forgotten request from BNK.RLVR.CAP.SUP.001.RET. Today HTTP-supplied; in a future revision it will arrive on the bus (see Open Question #1 in aggregates.yaml).

comment.description: Optional free-text annotation captured in the audit trail (PRJ.ANCHOR_HISTORY).
